text.source_text: विज्ञानात्मन एव देहेन्द्रियमनोबुद्धिसङ्घातोपाधिसम्पर्कात्कलुषीभूतस्य ज्ञानध्यानादिसाधनानुष्ठानात्सम्प्रसन्नस्य देहादिसङ्घातादुत्क्रमिष्यतः परमात्मनैक्योपपत्तेरिदमभेदेनोपक्रमणमित्यौडुलोमिराचार्यो मन्यते । श्रुति श्चैवं भवति — ‘ एष सम्प्रसादोऽस्माच्छरीरात्समुत्थाय परं ज्योतिरुपसम्पद्य स्वेन रूपेणाभिनिष्पद्यते ’ (छा. उ. ८ । १२ । ३) इति । क्वचिच्च जीवाश्रयमपि नामरूपं नदीनिदर्शनेन ज्ञापयति — ‘ यथा नद्यः स्यन्दमानाः समुद्रेऽस्तं गच्छन्ति नामरूपे विहाय । तथा विद्वान्नामरूपाद्विमुक्तः परात्परं पुरुषमुपैति दिव्यम् ’ (मु. उ. ३ । २ । ८) इति । यथा लोके नद्यः स्वाश्रयमेव नामरूपं विहाय समुद्रमुपयन्ति , एवं जीवोऽपि स्वाश्रयमेव नामरूपं विहाय परं पुरुषमुपैतीति हि तत्रार्थः प्रतीयते — दृष्टान्तदार्ष्टान्तिकयोस्तुल्यतायै ॥ २१ ॥
text.transliteration_iast: vijñānātmana eva dehendriyamanobuddhisaṅghātopādhisamparkātkaluṣībhūtasya jñānadhyānādisādhanānuṣṭhānātsamprasannasya dehādisaṅghātādutkramiṣyataḥ paramātmanaikyopapatteridamabhedenopakramaṇamityauḍulomirācāryo manyate | śruti ścaivaṃ bhavati — ‘ eṣa samprasādo'smāccharīrātsamutthāya paraṃ jyotirupasampadya svena rūpeṇābhiniṣpadyate ’ (chā. u. 8 | 12 | 3) iti | kvacicca jīvāśrayamapi nāmarūpaṃ nadīnidarśanena jñāpayati — ‘ yathā nadyaḥ syandamānāḥ samudre'staṃ gacchanti nāmarūpe vihāya | tathā vidvānnāmarūpādvimuktaḥ parātparaṃ puruṣamupaiti divyam ’ (mu. u. 3 | 2 | 8) iti | yathā loke nadyaḥ svāśrayameva nāmarūpaṃ vihāya samudramupayanti , evaṃ jīvo'pi svāśrayameva nāmarūpaṃ vihāya paraṃ puruṣamupaitīti hi tatrārthaḥ pratīyate — dṛṣṭāntadārṣṭāntikayostulyatāyai || 21 ||

translation.literal_translation: Acarya Audulomi holds that this non-difference-style opening is fitting because the empirical conscious self, made impure through association with body-sense-mind-intellect complexes, becomes clarified through knowledge and meditation, and when departing from the body-complex attains unity with the supreme self. Thus scripture can begin with non-difference in view of that eventual state.
translation.technical_translation: Audulomi-vada: abheda language is justified teleologically - identity is affirmed from the standpoint of post-sadhana realization and utkranti-linked consummation, not from the immediately conditioned empirical state. The model preserves pedagogical continuity between conditioned jiva and attained Brahman-unity.
translation.interpretive_note: Audulomi reads identity through process and culmination rather than immediate ontic collapse.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Rendered according to the standard teleological reading of Audulomi; detailed subclauses can be expanded later.
Terminology around utkranti is translated functionally and may be Sanskrit-retained in final pass.
